title: EntityScaler
description: Entities spawns with different sizes to break with the monotony of the game !
body:
# **EntityScaler - 1.20.6** | Fabric API required

Give to your entities **different sizes** to break with the monotony of the game !

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/o0vg79Zfs1w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Features
- Various random size for all vanilla entities (except players).
- Works for natural spawn, eggs, and /summon command.
- Persistant size state 
- Works Server-side _(mod on server AND clients)_
  
# Roadmap
- Entities loots are depending of the entity size (more or less drops, more or less experiences..)
- Entities attributes based on it's size (attack damage, speed...)
- User settings to set a maximum size to entities


# Support
Feel free to **report any bugs or issues** you meet using entityScaler.

Same goes for **feedback** of the general state of the mod, what you would like to add or see in the mod.


If you like this mod, **please comment & follow my projects**, it is always nice to see that these mods are worth something for people !
